title: Bold, italics, and underline
drDigitalIntro: You can change how your words look to add emphasis. Select some text, then press Ctrl+B to make it bold, Ctrl+I to make it italic, or Ctrl+U to underline it. Notice the pattern again — Command plus the first letter of what you want!
drDigitalSuccess: Bold, italic, underline — now your writing can stand out!
drDigitalHint: Read through the three formatting shortcuts, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
